sections.title: 2022 Amendment
sections.text:
The following amendment was made to the text of the standard following decisions taken at the forty-fifth session of the Codex Alimentarius Commission in December 2022.

Page Location Text in previous version  Text in amended version
3 Section 5.2
Labelling of non-retail containers
Information required in Section 5.1 of this Standard and Section 4 of the General Standard for the Labelling of Prepackaged Foods shall be given either on the container or in accompanying documents, except that the name of the product, lot identification, and the name and address of the manufacturer, packer, distributor and/or importer shall appear on the container.
However, lot identification, and the name and address of the manufacturer, packer, distributor and/or importer may be replaced by an identification mark provided that such a mark is clearly identifiable with the accompanying documents.
The labelling of non-retail containers should be in accordance with the General Standard for the Labelling of Non-Retail Containers of Foods (CXS 346-2021).

sections.title: SCOPE
sections.text: This standard applies exclusively to cocoa butter used as ingredient in the manufacture of chocolate and chocolate products.
sections.retrieval_text:
SCOPE
number=1
level=1
This standard applies exclusively to cocoa butter used as ingredient in the manufacture of chocolate and chocolate products.

page_spans.text: This standard applies exclusively to cocoa butter used as ingredient in the manufacture of chocolate and chocolate products.

sections.title: HYGIENE
sections.text: It is recommended that the products covered by the provisions of this standard be prepared and handled in accordance with the appropriate sections of the General Principles of Food Hygiene (CXC 1-1969), and other relevant Codex texts such as Codes of Hygienic Practice and Codes of Practice. The products should comply with any microbiological criteria established in accordance with the Principles and Guidelines for the Establishment and Application of Microbiological Criteria for Foods (CXG 21-1997).
sections.retrieval_text:

level=1

The products should comply with any microbiological criteria established in accordance with the Principles and Guidelines for the Establishment and Application of Microbiological Criteria for Foods (CXG 21-1997).

The products should comply with any microbiological criteria established in accordance with the Principles and Guidelines for the Establishment and Application of Microbiological Criteria for Foods (CXG 21-1997).

METHODS OF ANALYSIS AND SAMPLING
number=6
level=1

sections.title: Definition of cocoa butter
sections.text: Cocoa butter is the fat obtained from cocoa beans with the following characteristics: - free fatty acid content (expressed as oleic acid): not more than 1.75% m/m - unsaponifiable matter: not more than 0.7% m/m, except in the case of press cocoa butter which shall not be more than 0.35% m/m

classification.function: Mandate to comply with a specified standard
classification.pattern: Subject + modal (should) + be + in accordance with + reference to a standard

components.subject: The labelling of non-retail containers
components.prescribed_action: be in accordance with the General Standard for the Labelling of Non-Retail Containers of Foods (CXS 346-2021)

classification.justification: The sentence issues an obligation expressed with 'should' regarding compliance with a specific standard. The structure involves a subject and a compliance mandate referencing an external standard. Since no existing templates were matched and the structure is specific, it was classified as a new pattern with obligation modality and mandate communicative function.
notes: The use of 'should' here conveys a normative expectation often treated as obligation in regulatory text.
No exact template was found for 'should be in accordance with' phrasing referencing a standard.

pages.title: STANDARD FOR COCOA BUTTER
pages.summary: Página contém título principal do documento e cabeçalho, sem seções ou texto explicativo adicional para mapear.

Página apresenta um título principal em caixa alta '2022 Amendment', sem numeração. Conteúdo explicativo detalha as alterações no padrão. Não há seções ou subseções numeradas adicionais nesta página. Conforme regras, o título é nível 1. Texto está associado ao nó principal. Não há indicação de continuidade de conteúdo inter-páginas.

A página contém 6 seções principais numeradas (nível 1) e seus respectivos subtítulos (nível 2) quando presentes. Títulos são identificados por numeração e caixa alta. Textos foram associados aos nós corretos conforme hierarquia. Não há continuidade de conteúdo entre páginas identificado. Cabeçalho 'CXS 86-1981 3' foi excluído do texto.
